rules: Headings NEVER use Poppins. Body NEVER uses Clash Display.
Use extremely tight line-heights on large text to maintain editorial density.
Numbers must always use Clash Display and be treated as graphic elements.

spacing_and_layout.page_dimensions: w-[210mm] h-[297mm] overflow-hidden relative bg-sand break-inside-avoid shadow-2xl shrink-0 print:shadow-none print:m-0
density_strategies: Zero dead space: Stretch elements to fill vertical height (h-full) where possible.
Color Blocking: Use 50/50 horizontal or vertical background splits to anchor text.
Oversized Typography: If an image is missing, scale the H2 or metric number to take up 50% of the page.
Bleed Borders: Push borders and dividers to the absolute edge of the safe margin or bleed off page.
Motif: 'Before/After' split - strict diagonal or vertical line dividing two high-contrast panels.

page_1_cover.structure: Top: White logo chip + Tagline. Center: Massive H1 scaled to fill width. Bottom: High-contrast Orange block for hero stat.
page_1_cover.density_hack: The hero stat block should occupy the bottom 30% of the A4 height. Inside it, use a watermarked (10% opacity) '25%' taking up the entire block.

page_2_problem.structure: 2x2 Bento Grid stretching to fill page height. Header tight at top.
page_2_problem.density_hack: Each problem card has a massive Ink-colored number (01-04) pinned to the background. Cards have thick 2px #E6EAE6 borders.

page_3_solution.structure: Asymmetrical Grid. Top 40%: One massive horizontal card for 'Sell & Serve Faster'. Bottom 60%: 2x2 grid for remaining 4 buckets.
page_3_solution.density_hack: Use Emerald Green icons at 80px size. Text is scaled up. Card backgrounds are #14331F.

page_4_proof.background: Split screen: Top half bg-sand, bottom half bg_dark_premium
page_4_proof.structure: Top: 4 metrics in a tight 2x2 grid. Bottom: Massive quotation mark (Yellow), testimonial, and placeholder logo strip.
page_4_proof.density_hack: Metrics must be text-[80px] in Emerald and Orange. The logo strip can be geometric blocks (squares/circles in #14331F) if real logos are missing.

page_5_ai.structure: 4 vertical columns, or 4 horizontal stripes stretching edge-to-edge.
page_5_ai.density_hack: Use massive outline typography ('A.I.') bleeding off the background behind the use-cases.

page_6_sectors.structure: Dense masonry or 3x4 grid for 11 sectors. 12th slot is a solid Emerald brand block.
page_6_sectors.density_hack: Solid 1px #E6EAE6 borders forming a 'Technical/Control Room' grid. No gaps between cells (border-collapse look).

page_7_pricing.structure: 4-column strict table stretching from top margin to bottom margin.
page_7_pricing.density_hack: Pro column has bg_dark_premium. Reassurance row at bottom spans all 4 columns. Use large 'Billed Annually' text rotated 90deg along the left margin.

page_8_back_cover.structure: Massive CTA taking up top 40%. Central floating white card for QR code. Footer block for contacts.
page_8_back_cover.density_hack: Scale contact numbers/emails to text-[40px]. Use massive Lucide icons.

cards.default: p-8 border border-line bg-white h-full flex flex-col
cards.dark: p-8 border border-white/10 bg-[#14331F] h-full flex flex-col text-sand

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as an HTML/CSS multi-page layout. Wrap everything in a container that renders individual A4 pages: `w-[210mm] h-[297mm]`
Use page-break-after: always or break-inside-avoid for print rendering.
Implement the density hacks to ensure there is zero empty space. If an image is missing, scale the typography or use color-blocked backgrounds.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn web UI components for this; build bespoke editorial print-style layouts using pure Tailwind CSS divs.
Apply `data-testid` to all major sections, buttons, and metrics for automated testing.
